summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BuddyBot children's chatbot application. All core features working correctly including chat functionality, AI responses, profanity filtering, safety alerts, and parent dashboard monitoring.

ui_bugs.issue: When returning from parent dashboard to chat, conversation state is not maintained - shows 0 messages instead of previous conversation

passed_tests: API health check and all 13 backend endpoints working
Chat page loads with sidebar, new chat button, and BuddyBot welcome message
New conversation creation via message sending
Safe message exchange with AI responses using ReAct pattern
Profanity filter correctly blocks inappropriate messages
Restricted topic detection and alert creation
Conversation sidebar shows conversation list with flag indicators
Parent dashboard loads with correct stats (conversations, messages, alerts, flagged)
Parent dashboard tabs (Overview, Alerts, Conversations) all functional
Alert severity badges and resolve functionality working
Parent conversation detail shows AI thoughts and safety levels
Navigation between chat and parent dashboard
LLM integration working with emergentintegrations library
UI design matches specifications (soft pastels, rounded corners, child-friendly)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix conversation state management when navigating back from parent dashboard to chat page - conversation should remain loaded instead of resetting to empty state

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major features working, minor navigation state issue
